title: Eria gagnepainii

intro: Eria gagnepainii, also known as Gagnepain's Eria, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique, terrestrial habit and fragrant flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Eria gagnepainii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
